policyMetadata.noncomplianceMessage: DRCP control 'drcp-kv-10 - Enable treat detection capabilities with Microsoft Defender for Key Vaults'. For remediation, see https://confluence.office01.internalcorp.net:8453/display/DRCPKB/Incident+remediation+Key+Vault#IncidentremediationKeyVault#drcp-kv-10 .

policyDefinition.displayName: APG DRCP AKS Key Management Service (KMS) enabled
policyDefinition.description: Use Key Management Service (KMS) to encrypt secret data at rest in etcd for Kubernetes cluster security. Learn more at: https://aka.ms/aks/kmsetcdencryption.

drcp.name: KeyVaultKMSEnabled
drcp.controlDesc: Enable treat detection capabilities with Microsoft Defender for Key Vaults

metadata.description: Effect of this Azure Policy - Audit or Disabled.
